questions.q: 1/x3 +1 =(A/x+1 ) + (Bx + C/ x2-x+c) find the value of A is?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation:
Given:

1/x3+1 = A/ x+1 ​+ Bx+C/ x2−x+1​

Since:

x3+1=(x+1)(x2−x+1)

Multiplying both sides by: (x+1)(x2−x+1):

1=A(x2−x+1)+(Bx+C)(x+1)

Expanding:

1=(A+B)x2+(−A+B+C)x+(A+C)

Comparing coefficients:

A+B=0A+B=0
−A+B+C=0
A+C=1
A+B=0A+B=0B=−A

From A+C=1:

C=1−A

Substitute into the second equation:

−A−A+(1−A)=0
1−3A=0
A=1/3
